name: Ninja Suit (EX)
descrip: A bodysuit lovingly woven with a flexible textile, seemingly crafted after a specific model. Stimulates your ninja spirit, increasing your Technique and Allure by 10, your ability to run away and dodge when not in a Stance by 5%, your Arousal dealt with sex toys by 20%, and your Stance and Restraint escape ability by 25%... but increasing your chance to get Critically hit by 5%, and making you 10% more sensitive to Pain and Seduction.
